name: Balsamic Glazed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick fry pan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add chicken; cover and cook, turning occasionally, for about 10 minutes until the pieces are brown on all sides. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
3. To the drippings in the pan, add onion, peppers, and garlic. Cook, stirring, for about 5 minutes or until slightly tender.
4. Add tomatoes, balsamic vinegar, and red pepper flakes. Heat mixture to boiling; reduce heat and simmer until the mixture is slightly thick (about five minutes).
5. Stir in the olives, salt, and pepper. Return chicken to the pan; spoon sauce over chicken and cook for about 20 minutes or until the chicken is glazed and fork tender.
6. Arrange the chicken on a serving platter. Spoon the vegetable mixture over the chicken. Sprinkle with pine nuts. Garnish with basil sprigs.
